lines.speaker: Councillor Hughes
lines.text: You! You're the reason I'm in here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah... Sorry about that. This is what happens when you make poor life choices though.

lines.speaker: Councillor Hughes
lines.text: I hope you enjoy this moment, it won't last.

lines.speaker: Councillor Hughes
lines.text: Soon he will descend on this miserable lands and everything you know will be ash!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well that just sounds great. See you later.
